results.title: Restoration of tumor suppression using MRNA-based delivery system
results.abstract: Compositions and methods for treating cancer that include administering a therapeutically effective amount of a tumor suppressor mRNA complexed with a delivery vehicle as described herein, e.g., a nanoparticle.

results.title: NANOSTRUCTURED DRUG DELIVERY SYSTEM AS A MULTIFUNCTIONAL PLATFORM FOR THERAPY
results.abstract: The present invention discloses a drug delivery system for targeted therapy comprising a functionalized lipid-based nanoplatform, where at least one ligand is coupled to the surface of the nanoplatform and encapsulates at least one pharmaceutically active ingredient. results.title: Peptides and combination of peptides for use in immunotherapy against prostate cancer and other cancers
results.abstract: The present invention relates to peptides, proteins, nucleic acids and cells for use in immunotherapeutic methods. results.title: PHI29 MUTANTS AND USE THEREOF
results.abstract: Provided herein are compositions and methods using mutant Phi29 polymerases for nucleic acid amplification. results.title: Tissue targeted antigenic activation of the immune response to treat cancers
results.abstract: The invention provides in part methods of treating cancers of a specific organ or tissue by administering a composition that is antigenically specific for one or more microbes that are pathogenic in the specific organ or tissue in which the cancer is situated. results.title: Pharmaceutical composition for treatment and/or prevention of cancer
results.abstract: It is intended to provide a CAPRIN-1-targeting antibody superior in antitumor activity to conventional antibodies, and use thereof as a therapeutic and/or preventive agent for a cancer. results.abstract: A tumor associated protein has been discovered to exhibit immunoreactivity to human monoclonal antibody L92. results.abstract: A new approach to targeting imaging agents to macrophage-rich sites of interest is disclosed.
